prompt: Create a serene impressionist oil painting of a misty lotus pond at sunrise, with a great blue heron standing in shallow water slightly right of center among tall reeds and lily pads. The wide horizontal composition shows calm reflective water filling the foreground and middle ground, with exactly 14 visible water lilies: 3 large blossoms clustered at the lower left, 1 bud near them, 3 small pink blossoms near the center, 1 white blossom and 1 pink blossom beside the heron, 4 blossoms scattered across the right-side lily pads, and 1 small blossom near the far right reeds. Add many round green lily pads, soft ripples, and a clear reflected silhouette of the heron in the water. In the background, place a hazy tree line and a graceful willow-like tree on the right bank covered in pale pink blossoms and drooping branches. The sun sits low near the horizon in the center-left, glowing through peach, coral, lavender, and pale blue clouds, with warm golden light reflecting as a vertical path across the pond. Use a dreamy pastel palette, loose visible brushstrokes, atmospheric mist, romantic tranquil mood, painterly realism, soft edges, no text, no people, no buildings, no harsh contrast. Customize the scene with sunrise, pink and white, peach, coral, lavender, and pale blue, and impressionist oil painting.
